Discussion, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion to Consolidate cases 522590 and 518927 is Granted. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522590 WITH CASE CGC-12-518927
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BALWANTSINH THAKOR AND VIKRAMSINH DEVDHARA DBA AUBURN HOTEL'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522590 WITH CASE CGC-12-518927 is transferred to Department 501 because the actions involve claims regarding the habitability of plaintiffs' tenancies. The housing court handles such cases. The motion will be heard on April 24 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
